_meta.description: TutAR Books textbook catalog. NCERT/CBSE books are downloaded locally for fast embedded viewing. ICSE textbooks are copyrighted by private publishers (Selina, ML Aggarwal, etc.) and not freely distributable — teachers upload their own ICSE PDFs.
